name: start_mcp_notify_server
description: Writes mcp_notify_server.p and a launch .bat to C:\projects\mcp\mcp\ and starts the ABL batch notification server. The server keeps SERVER-SOCKET connections open on port 7890 and broadcasts notifications/tools/list_changed to all connected MCP clients whenever signal_tools_changed increments the tool-notify.trigger counter file. Returns server_file, bat_file, pid_file and trigger_file paths.

port.description: TCP port for notification socket. Default 7890.
